title: DeleteResult - Metadata API
description: Contains result information for the deleteMetadata call.

errors.description: An array of errors returned if the operation wasn’t successful.

fullName.description: The full name of the deleted component.

success.description: Indicates whether the deletion was successful (true) or not (false).
